subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses and revealed the clear proofs, and Who hath spoken that whereby the dwellers of the graves arose on that Day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی انزل الایات و اظهر البینات و نطق بما قام به اهل القبور فی یوم فیه
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
